destinations.evidence: The reader deduplicates requested TEE addresses, indexes serviceRecords by the TEE/primary address, and loads executor-capable services from serviceAddresses.
The capability filter excludes non-executor service roles such as Streaming, VllmProxy, Dkms, AutonomousAgent, and Telemetry while including the current executor-capable set.
destinations.snippet: matches!(self, Capability::HttpCall | Capability::Llm | Capability::WormholeQuery | Capability::ZkCall | Capability::ImageCall | Capability::AudioCall | Capability::VideoCall | Capability::Fhe)

equivalence_argument: The port preserves the key behavior by using TEE/primary addresses for serviceRecords and public-key reads; the capability allowlist has been generalized to the current executor-capable set while still excluding non-executor services.
notes: Mapped in the port registry-reader crate; capability filtering is a current-set generalization of the older listed executor services.
rationale: The commit deletes the legacy executor registry reader, adds ritual-tee-registry-reader, and states that executors are registered under TEE address because payment address is not unique across services. The reader's code uses service_record_slot(tee_addr), filters executor capabilities, and fails if service count exceeds MAX_SERVICES. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: The TEEServiceRegistry reader must use TEE/primary addresses, not payment addresses, as service record keys; it must read public keys from serviceRecords[tee].publicKey, deduplicate requested TEE addresses, cap service enumeration at MAX_SERVICES, and include only HttpCall, Llm, and WormholeQuery services when loading executor-capable services.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create mock TEEServiceRegistry storage with two services sharing payment address P but different TEE addresses and public keys; assert read_executor_public_keys returns both keyed by their TEE addresses. Add Streaming and VllmProxy services and assert read_all_executors excludes them while including HttpCall, Llm, and WormholeQuery. Set serviceAddresses length to MAX_SERVICES+1 and assert an ExecutorCountExceeded error.
summary: The TEE registry reader keys executor records and public keys by TEE address.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Mock two TEE addresses with the same payment address and assert both public keys are returned by TEE address; set serviceAddresses length above MAX_SERVICES and assert ExecutorCountExceeded.
title: Registry reader keys executors by TEE address
